results.title: Dehydration Headache vs Migraine: Physician Explains Key Differences
results.description: Confused between a dehydration headache and a migraine? Experts explain the key differences, symptoms and prevention tips for summer.

results.title: Rajneesh Narain Appointed Director (Finance) of IRCTC
results.description: The Government has approved the appointment of Rajneesh Narain, currently Director (Finance) at Northern Coalfields Limited, as Director (Finance) of IRCTC on immediate absorption basis till June 2030.

results.title: Tragic Loss: Family of Seafarer Killed in US Strike Seeks Body Repatriation
results.description: The family of Aditya Sharma, a 23-year-old seafarer who lost his life in a US military strike on an oil tanker, is appealing to the Himachal Pradesh government and central authorities for the return of his body to their village for last rites. They are seeking answers regarding the circumstances of his death and the rescue efforts made. Local officials have expressed their condolences and are working to facilitate the repatriation process. This tragic incident has left the family devastated, raising questions about safety and accountability in maritime operations.

results.title: Riyan Parag undergoes shoulder surgery; likely to miss initial part of 2026-27 domestic season
results.description: Mumbai, Jun 11 (PTI) Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag successfully underwent a right shoulder surgery here on Thursday. Parag, who led the Royals to the IPL 2026 playoffs, went through the procedure at the Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital under the watch of Dr Dinshaw Pardiwalla. The all-rounder will soon begin his recuperation at the BCCI [...]
